alt: Students gathering in the morning for prayer and reflection.
title: Morning Sadhana
description: A peaceful beginning with mantra meditation, prayer, and shared intention for the day.

alt: A scripture circle with students learning together.
title: Scripture Study
description: Collaborative reading circles create space for questions, insight, and personal application.

alt: Devotees preparing prasadam in the kitchen.
title: Prasadam Preparation
description: Cooking and serving become joyful acts of devotion and community care.

alt: An evening kirtan gathering with warm light and music.
title: Festival Evenings
description: Music, kirtan, and celebration bring the academy together in gratitude and joy.

alt: Students working together in a service project.
title: Shared Seva
description: Hands-on service cultivates humility, cooperation, and servant leadership.

alt: A quiet garden space for personal reflection.
title: Quiet Reflection
description: Students also have space for solitude, journaling, and contemplative rest.
